next_steps: Watch the worked example: npm install && npx hyperframes preview (talking head docks at ~3.6s, cards run on top)
Replace voiceover source: drop your talking-head video as Video1.mp4, transcribe it (npx hyperframes transcribe)
Edit build.py: CARDS list (s/e/kind per card — image, statement, word, price, clip, logo, cta) and CAPTIONS list, timed to the transcript
Product-specific scenes live under the BESPOKE SCENES markers in build.py — replace the paste/results UI with your product's
Swap in your images/clips referenced by the CARDS
Regenerate: python3 build.py (never edit index.html by hand)
QA + render: npx hyperframes lint && npx hyperframes render -o out.mp4 --quality draft
